reason: OpenSSF Scorecard requires live GitHub API network access (repo metadata, branch-protection, dependency graph). The project operating contract (CLAUDE.md) imposes a hard 'No network in CI/tests' invariant; the in-gate supply-chain audit is therefore offline-only and CANNOT execute Scorecard. Running it would either violate the offline invariant or fabricate a score. It is recorded NOT_RUN, not PASS.
honest_position: No Scorecard number is claimed anywhere. If Scorecard is ever run, it must be out-of-band (a separate non-gate, network-permitted workflow or a maintainer's machine), and this file must then be replaced with status RUN carrying a real tool_version + a committed scorecard_json artifact path produced by that run.
